noise.description: Source — returns a 2D coordinate-sampled colour. Inputs: scale (float, default 10), offset (float, default 0.1).

voronoi.signature: voronoi(scale: float = 5, speed: float = 0.3, blending: float = 0.3)
voronoi.description: Source — returns a 2D coordinate-sampled colour. Inputs: scale (float, default 5), speed (float, default 0.3), blending (float, default 0.3).

osc.signature: osc(frequency: float = 60, sync: float = 0.1, offset: float = 0)
osc.description: Source — returns a 2D coordinate-sampled colour. Inputs: frequency (float, default 60), sync (float, default 0.1), offset (float, default 0).

shape.signature: shape(sides: float = 3, radius: float = 0.3, smoothing: float = 0.01)
shape.description: Source — returns a 2D coordinate-sampled colour. Inputs: sides (float, default 3), radius (float, default 0.3), smoothing (float, default 0.01).

gradient.description: Source — returns a 2D coordinate-sampled colour. Inputs: speed (float, default 0).

src.description: Source — returns a 2D coordinate-sampled colour. Inputs: tex (sampler2D, default null).

solid.signature: solid(r: float = 0, g: float = 0, b: float = 0, a: float = 1)
solid.description: Solid colour source — paints the whole frame one colour.

rotate.description: Coordinate transform warping sampler input. Inputs: angle (float, default 10), speed (float, default 0).

scale.signature: .scale(amount: float = 1.5, xMult: float = 1, yMult: float = 1, offsetX: float = 0.5, offsetY: float = 0.5)
scale.description: Coordinate transform warping sampler input. Inputs: amount (float, default 1.5), xMult (float, default 1), yMult (float, default 1), offsetX (float, default 0.5), offsetY (float, default 0.5).

pixelate.description: Coordinate transform warping sampler input. Inputs: pixelX (float, default 20), pixelY (float, default 20).

posterize.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: bins (float, default 3), gamma (float, default 0.6).

shift.signature: .shift(r: float = 0.5, g: float = 0, b: float = 0, a: float = 0)
shift.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: r (float, default 0.5), g (float, default 0), b (float, default 0), a (float, default 0).

repeat.signature: .repeat(repeatX: float = 3, repeatY: float = 3, offsetX: float = 0, offsetY: float = 0)
repeat.description: Coordinate transform warping sampler input. Inputs: repeatX (float, default 3), repeatY (float, default 3), offsetX (float, default 0), offsetY (float, default 0).

modulateRepeat.signature: .modulateRepeat(repeatX: float = 3, repeatY: float = 3, offsetX: float = 0.5, offsetY: float = 0.5)
modulateRepeat.description: Combine a texture with another texture used as a coordinate map. Inputs: repeatX (float, default 3), repeatY (float, default 3), offsetX (float, default 0.5), offsetY (float, default 0.5).

repeatX.description: Coordinate transform warping sampler input. Inputs: reps (float, default 3), offset (float, default 0).

modulateRepeatX.description: Combine a texture with another texture used as a coordinate map. Inputs: reps (float, default 3), offset (float, default 0.5).

repeatY.description: Coordinate transform warping sampler input. Inputs: reps (float, default 3), offset (float, default 0).

modulateRepeatY.description: Combine a texture with another texture used as a coordinate map. Inputs: reps (float, default 3), offset (float, default 0.5).

kaleid.description: Coordinate transform warping sampler input. Inputs: nSides (float, default 4).

modulateKaleid.description: Combine a texture with another texture used as a coordinate map. Inputs: nSides (float, default 4).

scroll.signature: .scroll(scrollX: float = 0.5, scrollY: float = 0.5, speedX: float = 0, speedY: float = 0)
scroll.description: Coordinate transform warping sampler input. Inputs: scrollX (float, default 0.5), scrollY (float, default 0.5), speedX (float, default 0), speedY (float, default 0).

scrollX.description: Coordinate transform warping sampler input. Inputs: scrollX (float, default 0.5), speed (float, default 0).

modulateScrollX.description: Combine a texture with another texture used as a coordinate map. Inputs: scrollX (float, default 0.5), speed (float, default 0).

scrollY.description: Coordinate transform warping sampler input. Inputs: scrollY (float, default 0.5), speed (float, default 0).

modulateScrollY.description: Combine a texture with another texture used as a coordinate map. Inputs: scrollY (float, default 0.5), speed (float, default 0).

add.description: Combine two textures into one. Inputs: amount (float, default 1).

sub.description: Combine two textures into one. Inputs: amount (float, default 1).

blend.description: Combine two textures into one. Inputs: amount (float, default 0.5).

mult.description: Combine two textures into one. Inputs: amount (float, default 1).

modulate.description: Combine a texture with another texture used as a coordinate map. Inputs: amount (float, default 0.1).

modulateScale.description: Combine a texture with another texture used as a coordinate map. Inputs: multiple (float, default 1), offset (float, default 1).

modulatePixelate.description: Combine a texture with another texture used as a coordinate map. Inputs: multiple (float, default 10), offset (float, default 3).

modulateRotate.description: Combine a texture with another texture used as a coordinate map. Inputs: multiple (float, default 1), offset (float, default 0).

modulateHue.description: Combine a texture with another texture used as a coordinate map. Inputs: amount (float, default 1).

invert.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: amount (float, default 1).

contrast.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: amount (float, default 1.6).

brightness.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: amount (float, default 0.4).

luma.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: threshold (float, default 0.5), tolerance (float, default 0.1).

thresh.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: threshold (float, default 0.5), tolerance (float, default 0.04).

color.signature: .color(r: float = 1, g: float = 1, b: float = 1, a: float = 1)
color.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: r (float, default 1), g (float, default 1), b (float, default 1), a (float, default 1).

saturate.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: amount (float, default 2).

hue.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: hue (float, default 0.4).

colorama.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: amount (float, default 0.005).

sum.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: scale (vec4, default 1).

r.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: scale (float, default 1), offset (float, default 0).

g.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: scale (float, default 1), offset (float, default 0).

b.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: scale (float, default 1), offset (float, default 0).

a.description: Colour transform applied to the previous output. Inputs: scale (float, default 1), offset (float, default 0).

out.description: Render the chain to an output buffer (default o0).

render.description: Show a single buffer fullscreen (default: show all four).

time.description: Seconds elapsed since the Hydra instance started.

mouse.description: Object with `x` / `y` fields (pixel coordinates of the cursor).

o0.description: Output buffer 0 — the default display buffer.
